profile.name: Aggressive
profile.description: Growth focus. Heavy equity weighting maximises long-term expected return but expect periodic 20%+ drawdowns. Suitable if you have a long time horizon and won't panic-sell during downturns.

rebalance_events.rationale_text: Q1 2024 rebalance — Aggressive profile. Target allocation: 65% US stocks, 10% long-term Treasuries (TLT), 15% S&P 500 (SPY), 5% gold (GLD), 5% international stocks (EFA). Equity sleeve held at equal weight across selected names. No AI tilt applied this period.
